input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.16.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.16.1
            TITLE: cost event scoring will be provided on the fsae online website or with the cost scenario

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.16.1: Cost Event scoring will be provided on the FSAE Online website or with the Cost Scenario
S.3.16.1 Cost Event scoring will be provided on the FSAE Online website or with the Cost Scenario

final_answer: Cost Event scoring will be provided on the FSAE Online website or with the Cost Scenario
